# SCNSceneSourceAssetModifiedDateKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ SceneKit ](/documentation/scenekit)

- [ SCNSceneSourceAssetModifiedDateKey ](/documentation/scenekit/scnscenesourceassetmodifieddatekey)

-  SCNSceneSourceAssetModifiedDateKey 

Global Variable# SCNSceneSourceAssetModifiedDateKey

iOS 8.0–26.0DeprecatediPadOS 8.0–26.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.1–26.0DeprecatedmacOS 10.8–26.0DeprecatedtvOS 9.0–26.0DeprecatedvisionOS 1.0–26.0DeprecatedwatchOS 3.0–26.0Deprecated

```
let SCNSceneSourceAssetModifiedDateKey: String
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/scenekit/scnscenesourceassetmodifieddatekey#Discussion)

The date when the file was last modified. The corresponding value is an `NSDate` instance.
